name: Philadelphia Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
Filling:
8 apples, sliced
1 egg
1 cup Sugar
1 1/2 cups Sour cream
2 teaspoons Vanilla
1/3 cup Flour
1/8 teaspoon Salt
Topping:
1/3 cup Brown sugar
1/4 pound melted Butter
1/3 cup Granulated sugar
1 pinch Salt
1/3 cup Flour
1 teaspoon Cinnamon
1 cup Chopped walnuts
Crust: Combine flour, salt and butter in a bowl. Cut butter into flour. Add ice water; toss to form a ball. Roll out to fit 12-inch pie pan. Sprinkle with cinnamon. Bake at 400 degrees for 20 minutes.
Filling: Mix filling ingredients together. Fill shell. Bake at 450 degrees for 10 minutes. Then at 350 degrees for 40 minutes.
Topping: Sprinkle over pie. Bake for 15 minutes.
